title: Claude Code subagents as skill anatomy source
task_prompt: Audit a SKILL.md for role clarity, tool scope, context isolation, handoff quality, and verification policy.
assertions: must create eval cases rather than only prose advice
license_notes: docs public; verify reuse terms before embedding large excerpts

title: OpenHands microagents as reusable instruction anatomy source
task_prompt: Compare a skill against microagent-style instruction design: concise trigger, scoped knowledge, examples, safety, and activation behavior.
assertions: must separate load-time anatomy issues from runtime behavior issues
must require source provenance for golden cases
license_notes: OpenHands MIT; docs public; verify before redistributing snippets
